failedAssertions.reason: Multiple accessibility issues found: (1) One icon button (back arrow in header) lacks any accessible name - no aria-label, title, or text content. (2) No explicit aria-label attributes used on any buttons; action buttons rely solely on title attributes. (3) No ARIA live regions (aria-live, role=alert/status, aria-atomic) found for announcing status changes to screen readers. (4) Four select dropdown filters have no explicit labels. (5) Comprehensive WCAG AA color contrast audit still requires Lighthouse or axe-core which are not available in the current test toolset.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-DASH-019 from blocked to failed with detailed accessibility issue findings from manual keyboard and ARIA inspection
Documented that Electron CDP endpoint binds to 127.0.0.1 rather than localhost on Windows; agent-browser requires --cdp http://127.0.0.1:9222 syntax
